zh.Benbecula, Outer Hebrides, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar貝貝拉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell於1440年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾凱普時，她的父親Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch50歲，母親Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean45歲。她於1458年與Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1492年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛哈享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar貝貝拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell于1440年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾凱普时，她的父亲Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch50岁，母亲Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean45岁。她于1458年与Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1492年在苏格兰音巴內-爾洛哈享年52岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰Comhairle nan Eilean Siar貝貝拉。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonnell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brigid, Dermot, Colm, Donal, Eamonn, Aidan, Brendan, Brian Patrick, Bridgid, Caitlin, Ciaran, Conor.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, an old personal name composed of the elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘rule’. Compare the Scottish form McDonald .

nameMeanings.name: Marriott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Mariot. In medieval France it was a pet form of Mary , and so too in medieval England where it was also used as a pet form of Margery. Compare Marion .
possibly in some cases a variant of   Merriott  .

variants.name: Marrett
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a variant of   Garret .

variants.name: Merriott
meanings: habitational name from Merriott in Somerset. The placename may derive from Old English mere, miere ‘mare’, mere ‘pool’, or (ge)mǣre ‘boundary’ + geat ‘gate, gap’.

from the Middle English male personal name Meryet (Old English Mǣrgēat, from mǣre ‘famous’ + Gēat, a tribal name). In post-medieval times, both this surname and the placename in 1 above underwent changes in pronunciation, sometimes by confusion with Marriott , and often by losing the medial -i- or -y-, hence Merritt , Meritt , and so on.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell was born in 1440, in Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch, was 50 and her mother, Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean, was 45. She married Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron in 1458, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1492, in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Benbecula, Outer Hebrides, Scotland: Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell est née en 1440, à Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron en 1458, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1492, à Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Benbecula, Outer Hebrides, Scotland: Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell 1440 in Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch 50 und ihre Mutter Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean 45. Sie hat 1458 in Scotland Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1492 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron nel 1458, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1492, nel Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marriott of Keppoch MacDonellが1440年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアケップオチで生まれた時，父Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppochは50歳，母Catherine MacPhee of Glen Speanは45歳であった。1458年にスコットランドでSir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1492年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロチャバーで52歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドComhairle nan Eilean Siarベンベクウラにて埋葬された。

ko.Benbecula, Outer Hebrides, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 벤베컬라
ko.lifeSummary: Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell(이)가 1440년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 케프포치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1458년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 럭압어에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 벤베컬라에 묻혔다.

pt.Benbecula, Outer Hebrides, Scotland: Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell nasceu em 1440, em Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron em 1458, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1492, em Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ro.Benbecula, Outer Hebrides, Scotland: Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.Benbecula, Outer Hebrides, Scotland: бенбекула, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell родилась в 1440 г. в местности кеппоч, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron в 1458 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1492 г. в местности лочабир, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности бенбекула, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell nació en 1440, en Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron en 1458, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1492, en Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Benbecula, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escocia, Reino Unido.
